title: Unstable Quick Sort with Missing Swap

statement.markdown: Solve the problem and fix the bugs.
statement.inputFormat: The input will contain an array of integers.
statement.outputFormat: The function should sort the array in ascending order.
statement.notes: The function should use quick sort with recursion. Time complexity O(n log n), space complexity O(log n).

functionSignature.cpp: void sort(int arr[], int low, int high);
functionSignature.java: public void sort(int arr[], int low, int high);

solutions.cpp: // Full executable C++ solution file that reads from std::cin, calls Solution::sort, and prints output to std::cout.
solutions.python: // Full executable Python solution file that reads from sys.stdin, calls Solution.sort, and prints output.
